tools.name: generate_image
tools.description: Generate an AI image from text prompt using VAP (Flux2 Pro). Returns a task ID for async tracking. Cost: $0.18

tools.name: get_task
tools.description: Get the status and result of a generation task. Returns image URL when completed.

tools.name: list_tasks
tools.description: List recent generation tasks with optional status filter.

tools.name: check_balance
tools.description: Check VAP account balance. Returns available, reserved, and usable balances.

tools.name: estimate_cost
tools.description: Estimate the cost of an image generation before executing. Cost: $0.18

tools.name: generate_video
tools.description: Generate an AI video from text prompt using VAP (P-Video). Returns a task ID for async tracking. Cost: $1.96. IMPORTANT: Send ONLY the video description. Do NOT include any instructions, guidelines, or meta-text. Just the pure visual description.

tools.name: estimate_video_cost
tools.description: Estimate the cost of a video generation. Cost: $1.96 (P-Video)

tools.name: generate_music
tools.description:
Generate AI music from text description using VAP. Returns a task ID for async tracking. Cost: $0.68.

IMPORTANT: Send ONLY the music description. Do NOT include any instructions or meta-text.

Describe: genre, mood, instruments, tempo, vocal style (or specify instrumental).

Example prompt: "Upbeat

tools.name: estimate_music_cost
tools.description: Estimate the cost of music generation. Cost: $0.68

tools.name: inpaint
tools.description: Remove or replace objects in an image using AI inpainting. Cost: $0.15. Requires Tier 1+.

tools.name: ai_edit
tools.description: Edit images using AI with natural language prompts. Supports single and multi-image editing. Cost: $0.15. Requires Tier 1+.

tools.name: background_remove
tools.description: Remove the background from an image, leaving only the subject with transparency. Cost: $0.10. Requires Tier 1+.

tools.name: upscale
tools.description: Upscale/enhance an image to higher resolution using AI. Cost: $0.15. Requires Tier 1+.

tools.name: video_trim
tools.description: Trim a video to a specific time range. Cost: $0.05. Requires Tier 1+.

tools.name: video_merge
tools.description: Merge multiple video clips into one continuous video. Cost: $0.05. Requires Tier 1+.

tools.name: get_operation
tools.description: Get the status and result of an operation. Returns output URL when completed.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_task, get_operation · Public sink: generate_video, generate_music · Destructive: inpaint, background_remove.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_task, get_operation · Public sink: generate_video, generate_music · Destructive: inpaint, background_remove

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
